title: LittleChaSiu's Modpack
description: My personal modpack, focused largely on tech and decorative stuff.
body:
## LCSpack (LittleChaSiu's Modpack)

My personal modpack, mainly tech mods but also a few decorative mods.

* Create (+ Crafts & Additions, Steam n Rails), Farmer's Delight, Applied Energistics
* Decorative items from Chipped, Supplementaries, etc
* GUI tools like EMI and a dura number tooltip
* Some quality-of-life tweaks
